<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" fill="none">
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#ffffff"/>

  <!-- Tail -->
  <path d="M170 300 C95 305, 70 350, 85 395 C100 440, 160 445, 180 410"
        stroke="#8a5a2b" stroke-width="18" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M175 295 C125 305, 105 338, 115 372"
        stroke="#6b3f1f" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Body -->
  <ellipse cx="260" cy="300" rx="150" ry="90" fill="#d7a66a"/>
  <ellipse cx="310" cy="280" rx="110" ry="75" fill="#c9965a"/>

  <!-- Head -->
  <ellipse cx="385" cy="235" rx="62" ry="50" fill="#d7a66a"/>
  <ellipse cx="415" cy="225" rx="35" ry="30" fill="#c9965a"/>

  <!-- Ears -->
  <path d="M430 185 C450 170, 470 190, 455 210 C440 205, 432 197, 430 185 Z" fill="#c9965a"/>
  <path d="M400 182 C410 160, 440 165, 435 195 C420 195, 407 192, 400 182 Z" fill="#c9965a"/>
  <path d="M434 187 C446 178, 459 190, 451 200" stroke="#8a5a2b" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M403 185 C411 172, 430 175, 427 193" stroke="#8a5a2b" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Legs -->
  <ellipse cx="210" cy="380" rx="26" ry="50" fill="#c9965a"/>
  <ellipse cx="260" cy="390" rx="25" ry="52" fill="#c9965a"/>
  <ellipse cx="312" cy="386" rx="24" ry="50" fill="#c9965a"/>
  <ellipse cx="165" cy="385" rx="22" ry="45" fill="#c9965a"/>

  <!-- Feet -->
  <ellipse cx="205" cy="432" rx="28" ry="14" fill="#8a5a2b" opacity="0.75"/>
  <ellipse cx="258" cy="443" rx="28" ry="14" fill="#8a5a2b" opacity="0.75"/>
  <ellipse cx="312" cy="439" rx="28" ry="14" fill="#8a5a2b" opacity="0.75"/>
  <ellipse cx="160" cy="438" rx="26" ry="13" fill="#8a5a2b" opacity="0.75"/>

  <!-- Spots (rosettes-ish) -->
  <!-- Body spots -->
  <g fill="#6b3f1f" opacity="0.92">
    <circle cx="170" cy="270" r="16"/>
    <circle cx="195" cy="320" r="14"/>
    <circle cx="230" cy="295" r="15"/>
    <circle cx="250" cy="345" r="14"/>
    <circle cx="275" cy="285" r="16"/>
    <circle cx="300" cy="325" r="14"/>
    <circle cx="330" cy="290" r="15"/>
    <circle cx="345" cy="340" r="14"/>
    <circle cx="385" cy="300" r="15"/>
    <circle cx="200" cy="370" r="14"/>
    <circle cx="255" cy="385" r="14"/>
    <circle cx="315" cy="372" r="14"/>
    <circle cx="350" cy="390" r="13"/>
  </g>
  <g fill="#d7a66a" opacity="0.9">
    <circle cx="170" cy="270" r="7"/>
    <circle cx="195" cy="320" r="6.5"/>
    <circle cx="230" cy="295" r="7"/>
    <circle cx="250" cy="345" r="6.5"/>
    <circle cx="275" cy="285" r="7"/>
    <circle cx="300" cy="325" r="6.5"/>
    <circle cx="330" cy="290" r="7"/>
    <circle cx="345" cy="340" r="6.5"/>
    <circle cx="385" cy="300" r="7"/>
    <circle cx="200" cy="370" r="6.5"/>
    <circle cx="255" cy="385" r="6.5"/>
    <circle cx="315" cy="372" r="6.5"/>
    <circle cx="350" cy="390" r="6"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Head spots -->
  <g fill="#6b3f1f" opacity="0.95">
    <circle cx="370" cy="225" r="11"/>
    <circle cx="410" cy="250" r="10"/>
    <circle cx="395" cy="205" r="9"/>
    <circle cx="435" cy="220" r="8"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Snout and facial marks -->
  <path d="M345 235 C350 268, 380 270, 408 265" stroke="#8a5a2b" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M360 255 C372 270, 392 270, 402 260" stroke="#6b3f1f" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- Eyes (no text) -->
  <ellipse cx="420" cy="232" rx="10" ry="7" fill="#3b2414"/>
  <circle cx="423" cy="229" r="3" fill="#ffffff"/>

  <!-- Nose -->
  <path d="M440 245 C450 248, 450 260, 440 262 C430 260, 430 248, 440 245 Z" fill="#3b2414"/>

  <!-- Whisker lines -->
  <path d="M395 252 C365 250, 345 255, 320 270" stroke="#6b3f1f" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M400 260 C368 265, 345 278, 320 292" stroke="#6b3f1f" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M403 268 C372 282, 350 300, 325 320" stroke="#6b3f1f" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.reasoning:
**Creating leopard illustration**

I need to depict a leopard without any text. The idea is straightforward: I'll draw the animal's spots and silhouette using shapes like ellipses and paths, but no letters at all. I'll create an SVG file at 512 pixels without a background. I'll draw the body as an ellipse, the head as a circle, with lines for the legs and a curved tail, while adding spots as circles. Maybe I'll include stripes, but I definitely want to keep the spots as rosettes!

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}

**Identifying cookie shapes**

Initially, I'm considering "cookie," but it could also resemble an otter due to its tan color. There are bear-like features, such as ears and paws.
